fn main() -> Unit
  mut i = 1
  mut c3 = 1
  mut c5 = 1
  while i <= 15
    mut printed = false
    if c3 == 3
      print("Fizz")
      c3 = 0
      printed = true
    end
    if c5 == 5
      print("Buzz")
      c5 = 0
      printed = true
    end
    if not printed
      print("#{i}")
    end
    i = i + 1
    c3 = c3 + 1
    c5 = c5 + 1
  end
end
